resources.string: Drag to resize the stand-in panel
Restart the ADB server to apply changed settings
Automatically enter an ADB shell; disable to enter a regular, non-adb shell without pairing
The size of the screen output buffer. Increasing this value will show more output on the screen at once at the cost of performance. (Default: 16384)
The command to run once the shell has begun
View the tutorial from the XDA Developers page

Either you entered the pairing information incorrectly, or your device is not being detected. First, ensure that Wireless Debugging is actually enabled. If that does not work, Try the "Factory reset" setting in X-OmniClaw to try pairing again.

Your device does not natively support Wireless Debugging, which is required by X-OmniClaw. Alternatively, you can use a PC to enable this feature, even on unsupported devices. It will last until the next reboot. Connect the device to a PC and type: adb tcpip 5555
View the source code on GitHub
X-OmniClaw Accessibility Service for controlling device interface
